description: PROTOCOL §10 reference formula — ud_base = floor(money_supply × c_period_ppm / ud_weight_total); recipient = floor(ud_base × weight / 1000000). Weights are integer micro-weights (standard member = 1000000). Values independently computed (Python).

cases.name: identity-doc example node (57 members + weighted fund, 274 ppm/day ≈ 10%/yr)
